meta.title: City Approves New Transit Line
meta.excerpt: The council voted on Tuesday to fund a new light-rail corridor connecting the harbour district to the university.

children.text: The council voted on Tuesday to fund a new light-rail corridor connecting the harbour district to the university.

This paragraph carries enough genuine prose for Mozilla Readability to score the article body above the surrounding navigation and sidebar chrome, which is the whole point of the readable-extraction pass.

Construction is expected to begin next spring, with the first trains running in three years.
